abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

materials: YarnArt JEANS (55% cotton, 45% Polyacrylic) Color No.:29

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work ten single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for three rows.
rounds.title: Rows 2-4

rounds.summary: Increase in four stitches, then single crochet in the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Row 5

rounds.summary: Repeat (single crochet, increase) seven times.
rounds.title: Row 6

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for five rows.
rounds.title: Rows 7-11

rounds.summary: Decrease twice, then single crochet in the remaining ten stitches.
rounds.title: Row 12

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.rawInstruction: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.summary: Stuff the head portion of the body.
rounds.title: Stuff (it will only be in my head)

rounds.summary: Decrease once, then single crochet in the remaining ten stitches.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for seventy rows.
rounds.title: Rows 14-83

rounds.summary: Decrease once, then single crochet in the remaining nine stitches.
rounds.title: Row 84

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Row 85

rounds.summary: Decrease once, then single crochet in the remaining eight stitches.
rounds.title: Row 86

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Row 87

rounds.summary: Decrease once, then single crochet in the remaining seven stitches.
rounds.title: Row 88

rounds.rawInstruction: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire
rounds.summary: Insert wire into the body and pre-bend the edges.
rounds.title: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire

rounds.summary: Decrease once, then single crochet in the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Row 89

rounds.summary: Decrease once, then single crochet in the remaining five stitches.
rounds.title: Row 90

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rows.
rounds.title: Rows 91-92

rounds.summary: Close the remaining six loops to finish the body.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops

rounds.rawInstruction: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.summary: Glue the eyes onto the snake and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.title: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows
